title: Tiny On-Disk Substitutive Artifact Fixture

W_low_format.description: Blocked int4 quantized, nibble-packed into uint8, per-block fp16 scales. Prototype format (same nibble density as Q4_K_M, different metadata layout).

memory_accounting.memory_margin_note: REAL — based on actual stored bytes, not theoretical
memory_accounting.runtime_margin_note: Decode bloat (full fp32 unpack) is runtime issue, not artifact format issue

runtime_counters.W_ref_loaded_note: absent — not loaded by loader or runtime
runtime_counters.W_low_loaded_note: packed artifact bytes (not fp32 decode temp)
runtime_counters.W_low_decode_temp_note: fp32 materialized during compute (expected in toy runtime, production issue)
runtime_counters.dense_R_materialized_note: dense R never created — sparse representation only

what_passed: SHA-256 checksums validate for both W_low and residual
W_ref absent (not loaded by loader or runtime)
Residual encoded present and decodable (Phase 31Q format)
Path label [SDI-SUB-RUNTIME] confirmed in substitutive path
Memory margin POSITIVE for artifact (+708,180 bytes vs Q4 budget)
Runtime substitutive path runs with real activations
Delta cosine positive for all 3 test prompts
No regressions (substitutive improves over low-only for all prompts)
W_low is nibble-packed (0.5625 bytes/element) — 4× more compact than toy harness fp32
what_is_partial: Runtime decode path materializes full fp32 W_low (17.4 MB decode temp)
Production runtime requires streaming decode without full fp32 materialization
W_low is NOT bit-exact GGUF Q4_K_M (prototype nibble format, not llama.cpp)
classification_reason: Artifact format is valid and self-contained. All structural checks pass. Memory margin is positive for the on-disk artifact (+708 KB vs Q4 budget). Runtime substitutive path runs correctly with delta cosine positive. The decode-to-fp32 bloat is a runtime implementation concern (streaming decode needed), not an artifact format defect.

recommended_next_phase.title: Streaming decode runtime for packed artifact
recommended_next_phase.rationale: Artifact format validated. Next: implement streaming row-by-row W_low decode without full fp32 materialization, and verify runtime memory margin stays positive.
